raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.7": 4,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, identifying multiple issues with the original text.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags several missing or wrong citations, including a potentially fabricated Patel & Ousterhout (2021) reference, but does not provide bibliographic precision for all claims.",
    "RX.1": "The agent clearly marks uncertainty and confidence levels for each recommendation, disclosing potential limitations in their analysis.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed-upon active set J*(d), addressing all relevant dimensions without introducing new errors or fabrications.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original text, such as conflating liveness with performance, and provides constructive recommendations for improvement.",
    "RX.5": "While the agent provides some annotations on source and reason for their claims, they do not consistently provide detailed provenance or traceability for all non-cosmetic changes."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.95,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.85
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, identifying multiple issues with the original text.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags several missing or wrong citations, including a potentially fabricated Patel & Ousterhout (2021) reference, but does not provide bibliographic precision for all claims.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly marks uncertainty and confidence levels for each recommendation, disclosing potential limitations in their analysis.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed-upon active set J*(d), addressing all relevant dimensions without introducing new errors or fabrications.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original text, such as conflating liveness with performance, and provides constructive recommendations for improvement.
rationale.RX.5: While the agent provides some annotations on source and reason for their claims, they do not consistently provide detailed provenance or traceability for all non-cosmetic changes.
